## Current Milestone

Wave 1 (parallel): D1+D3+D4. Wave 2: D2. Wave 3: D5. **D1 State-Precondition Library** — `bin/cli-preflight.cjs` (pluggable check registry: branch-guard, ports-free, deps-installed, contracts-stable, manifest-fresh, working-tree-state; deterministic `{ok,checks[],notes[]}` envelope; schema-versioned, zero deps mirroring `bin/parallelism-report.cjs`). **D2 Parallel-CLI Substrate** — `bin/parallel-cli.cjs` (N-worker pool, every spawn flows through `captureSpawn`, log-stream tee to per-worker NDJSON, lifecycle/timeout/fail-fast policy, engine-only — does NOT touch command files yet; concurrency defaults calibrated from D3 empirical map). **D3 Rate-Limit Probe + Empirical Map** — `bin/gsd-t-ratelimit-probe.cjs` (synthetic-worker harness mirroring real GSD-T spawn shape; sweep matrix `{1,2,3,4,5,6,8} workers × {10k,30k,60k,100k} context`; captures per-worker time-to-first-token, 429 count + which worker, total wall-clock, effective ITPM/OTPM; backoff probe + 5-min steady-state probe; real spawns into throwaway worktree; output `.gsd-t/ratelimit-map.json`). **D4 Context-Brief Generator** — `bin/gsd-t-context-brief.cjs` (single entry: `gsd-t brief --kind {execute|verify|qa|red-team|design-verify|scan} --domain X --json`; LLM judges summary, never raw output); wire preflight into `gsd-t-execute` Step 1 + verify-gate into `gsd-t-verify` Step 2; update qa/red-team/design-verify subagent prompts with brief-first rule; doc ripple to architecture.md, requirements.md, CLAUDE.md, gsd-t-help.md; Pre-Commit Gate update. **Goal**: lift practical parallelism ceiling from ~3 LLM workers to ~6–10 mixed workers (1 LLM judge + N CLIs) by replacing deterministic LLM work with deterministic CLI work, prove via empirical measurement, and gate every spawn with deterministic state checks. **Why**: pain pattern across M48/M49/M50/M52 — silent-skip regressions caught only by retrofit hooks, ad-hoc `Promise.all([Task,...])` patterns bypassing `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs`, "verify" PASS without precondition checks; PLUS hitting undocumented Claude rate-limit ceiling at ~3 parallel workers because every worker re-loads ~60k context blowing through ITPM. **Success criteria** (8 falsifiable, measure before tag/publish per `feedback_measure_dont_claim.md`): (1) state-preflight envelope schema published as STABLE contract; (2) substrate proves ≥3× speedup on a real fan-out scenario via in-tree proof CLI (measurement, not claim); (3) verify-gate blocks ≥3 distinct state-preflight failure classes (wrong-branch, port-conflict, contract-DRAFT) in `e2e/journeys/`-shape tests with manifest entries; (4) ≥40% token reduction per milestone for execute+verify cycles vs trailing-3 baseline (M52, M54, prior); (5) zero 429 errors at parallelism level D3 declared safe + peak parallelism ≥6 concurrent workers; (6) verify-gate wall-clock ≤ ½ trailing-3 median; (7) Red Team GRUDGING PASS — ≥5 broken patches, all caught (preflight-skip-on-error, parallel-substrate-bypasses-capture, verify-gate-falsy-true, branch-guard-typo, contract-staleness-ignored, brief-staleness-ignored); (8) zero regressions on `npm test` (baseline 2262/2262 unit + 1 documented env-bleed). **Out of scope**: rewriting all 55 command files to call the substrate directly (separate ratchet milestone, pending M55 ship); cross-project preflight/brief propagation via `gsd-t update-all` (follow-up); replacing `bin/gsd-t-worker-dispatch.cjs` or `bin/gsd-t-unattended.cjs` with the substrate (those are unattended-mode supervisors, distinct surface). **Charter**: `.gsd-t/charters/m55-charter.md`. **Standing directive**: execute through to COMPLETED autonomously;
